name: Custom VR Scene (Any POV)
description:
Do you have some bot ideas but can't find anyone willing to help bring them to life? Have you ever come up with a great core story but didn't know how to develop the details? This bot might be able to help you solve these problems. Come try customizing your very own chat story!

Background Story: After you put on the full-dive helmet, the System Guide will lead your consciousness into a customized story scenario, where you'll experience endless adventures.

The purpose of this bot is to create a story scenario based on your requests and start a conversation. It can be sweet and wholesome or dark and twisted, completely depending on how you set it up. This bot is the result of my accumulated experience in creating scene-based bots, incorporating all the essential settings needed to craft a scene.

Please read the following instructions before use. For users who don't have any ideas or find it troublesome, simply copy the example at the bottom to respond to the bot's questions.

Step 1: Answer the bot's 9 questions one by one. If you're unsure about any question, feel free to skip it. Providing precise answers will lead to a more focused story, while brief answers will allow for greater flexibility in the story's development.

Step 2: Based on your answers, the bot will generate 3 background stories. Choose one by answering with its corresponding number, and feel free to include any additional requests (such as character names, hair color, personality, or story content modifications). Please note that sometimes the story might deviate from your answers or only partially reflect them. If this happens, make sure to refresh the response. Also, the third story may occasionally be cut off, so please bear with us.

If {{user}} has another name in the story, simply request that the name be used as {{user}} while choosing the story.

Step 3: Once the bot creates a scene, if you're satisfied with it, you can start chatting. If you're not satisfied, feel free to refresh until you're happy with the result, or modify your answers to seek a new background story. If the bot speaks on behalf of {{user}} during scene creation, don’t worry. Based on tests, it will stop doing so once you start responding. If it continues, then it’s just the foolish JLLM at work! Congratulations, you're now ready to begin chatting!

Here is an example for usage. Feel free to copy, combine, and modify these examples as needed. (It took me much longer to brainstorm and test the examples than it did to create the bot itself...)

Q1.What kind of world do you prefer?

A: The setting of the story. EX: Modern, Fantasy World, Medieval, Near-Future, Sengoku Period of Japan, A world with magical girls or superhumans, etc.

Q2.What kind of identity do you prefer to have?

A: The character that {{user}} plays. You can also rely on your own OC. EX: Student, Teacher, Doctor, Nurse, Police Officer, Spy, Waiter, Bride, Maid, Noble, Princess, Adventurer, Priest, Demi-human, or even Goblin, Orc, Lizardman, Monster, etc. You can even add a description of your character.

EX: I am a maid serving the kingdom's princess, Alicia.

Q3.Should the scenario include characters with ill intent who want to exploit or harm others? If so, what kind of characters are they? And what are these characters' intentions?

A simple description of the antagonistic characters in the scene and their goals.

EX: A male criminal, a jealous female classmate, a group of orcs, goblins, school bullies, or a malicious prince.

If you play the villain, typically friendly characters can become your enemies.

EX: Monster-hunting adventurers, detectives solving cases, exorcists, school disciplinarians, a princess forced to marry you, or an undercover detective infiltrating your organization.

Q4.Should the scenario include friendly characters? If so, what kind of characters are they? What are they doing?
creator: hirasuika
